content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:RebelAllianceSourcebookSecondEditionCover.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' released in 1990.]]

A list of events in '''1990''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Diane Polley]] dies.
*[[January 22|22]] – [[Bobby Hall]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]'', a supplement for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]], is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]'', a supplement for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]], is published by [[West End Games]].

==February==
*[[February 16|16]] – ''[[Entertainment Weekly]]'' is founded.

==March==
*[[March 13|13]] – [[Alec Medlock]] is born.
*[[March 24|24]] – [[Keisha Castle-Hughes]] is born.

==April==
*[[April 20|20]] – [[Alex McCrindle]] dies.

==May==
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Thomas Brodie-Sangster]] is born.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi's Honor]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Isis Coordinates]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Death in the Undercity]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]'' published.

==September==
*[[September 5|05]] – [[Max Mittelman]] is born.

==October==
*?? – ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' published.

==December==
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Mandeep Dhillon]] is born.

==Unknown date==
*[[Amir El-Masry]] is born.
*[[Aaron Heffernan]] is born.
*[[Black Ice (adventure)|''Black Ice'']] published.
*''[[Escape from the Death Star]]'' published.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 10|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 10]] published in Winter.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 11|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 11]] published in Spring.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 12|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 12]] published in Summer.
*– [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 13|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 13]] published in Winter.

----
